material_specs:
Materials for a typical lightweight commercial building. All dimensions in meters.
Material:NoMass
  Name = R13_Insulation
  R-value = 2.29  (i.e. R-13 hr·ft²·°F/Btu in IP)
Material:NoMass
  Name = R8_Insulation
  R-value = 1.41  (R-8)
Material
  Name = Stucco
  Roughness = MediumSmooth
  Thickness = 0.0254
  Conductivity = 0.72
  Specific Heat = 840
  Density = 1856
Material
  Name = Gypsum_Board
  Roughness = Smooth
  Thickness = 0.0127
  Conductivity = 0.16
  Specific Heat = 1090
  Density = 800
WindowMaterial:SimpleGlazingSystem
  Name = Simple_Window
  U-Factor = 2.5
  Solar Heat Gain Coefficient = 0.4
  Visible Transmittance = 0.6
schedule_specs:
Schedules (compact schedules for office):
Schedule:Compact: Office_Workday
  Through: 12/31
  For: Weekdays
  Until: 07:00, 0.1
  Until: 09:00, 0.8  ! ramp up
  Until: 18:00, 1.0  ! full occupancy
  Until: 20:00, 0.5
  Until: 24:00, 0.1
Schedule:Compact: Office_Weekend
  Through: 12/31
  For: Weekends Holidays
  Until: 24:00, 0.1
Schedule:Compact: Office_Lighting
  same as Office_Workday
Schedule:Compact: Office_HVAC
  Through: 12/31
  For: AllDays
  Until: 24:00, 1.0
Schedule:Compact: Office_Thermostat_Heating
  Through: 12/31
  For: AllDays
  Until: 24:00, 20.0  ! °C
Schedule:Compact: Office_Thermostat_Cooling
  Through: 12/31
  For: AllDays
  Until: 24:00, 24.0  ! °C
construction_specs:
Constructions (each is a standalone construction, no mixing of glass and air gap):
Construction: Default_Ext_Wall
  layers: Stucco, R13_Insulation, Gypsum_Board
Construction: Default_Int_Wall
  layers: Gypsum_Board, R8_Insulation, Gypsum_Board
Construction: Default_Floor
  layers: Gypsum_Board, R8_Insulation, Gypsum_Board
Construction: Default_Ceiling
  layers: same as Default_Floor
Construction: Default_Roof
  layers: Stucco, R13_Insulation, Gypsum_Board
Construction: Default_GroundFloor
  layers: Gypsum_Board, R8_Insulation, Gypsum_Board
Construction: Default_Window
  layers: Simple_Window
surface_specs:
All surfaces are defined as rectangular planes with vertices in world coordinates (x East, y North, z up) listed CCW from outside. Construction names are as above.
General notes:
- For interzone floor/ceiling pairs, the slab is split into sub-surfaces so that every sub-surface has an exact geometric match on the adjacent zone. The sub-surface names are formed as <Zone>_Ceiling_<segment> or <Zone>_Floor_<segment> and paired explicitly.
- The slab between F2 and F3 is split at x=7.50 (to match F3_S1/F3_S2 zones) and the slab between F1 and F2 is split at x=7.50 as well as at the F2 north zone boundaries (x=3.75, 7.50, 11.25) to match F2 north floors.

Floor 1 zones:
F1_S1:
  SouthWall   (y=0.00) : (0,0,3.6)->(5,0,3.6)->(5,0,0)->(0,0,0)  [Outdoors, Construction=Default_Ext_Wall]
  EastWall    (x=5.00) : neighbour F1_S2 interior wall -> (5,0,3.6)->(5,3,3.6)->(5,3,0)->(5,0,0)  [Zone, adjacent_zone=F1_S2, Construction=Default_Int_Wall]
  NorthWall   (y=3.00) : (5,3,3.6)->(0,3,3.6)->(0,3,0)->(5,3,0)  [Zone, adjacent_zone=F1_Corridor, Construction=Default_Int_Wall]
  WestWall    (x=0.00) : (0,3,3.6)->(0,0,3.6)->(0,0,0)->(0,3,0)  [Outdoors, Construction=Default_Ext_Wall]
  Floor       : (0,0,0)->(5,0,0)->(5,3,0)->(0,3,0)  [Ground, Construction=Default_GroundFloor]
  Ceiling     : (0,3,3.6)->(5,3,3.6)->(5,0,3.6)->(0,0,3.6)  [Interzone, see pairing below]
F1_S2:
  SouthWall   : (5,0,3.6)->(10,0,3.6)->(10,0,0)->(5,0,0)  [Outdoors]
  EastWall    : (10,0,3.6)->(10,3,3.6)->(10,3,0)->(10,0,0)  [Zone, adjacent_zone=F1_S3, Default_Int_Wall]
  NorthWall   : (10,3,3.6)->(5,3,3.6)->(5,3,0)->(10,3,0)  [Zone, adjacent_zone=F1_Corridor]
  WestWall    : (5,3,3.6)->(5,0,3.6)->(5,0,0)->(5,3,0)  [Zone, adj=F1_S1, Default_Int_Wall]  (note: same physical surface as F1_S1 EastWall, must be paired)
  Floor       : (5,0,0)->(10,0,0)->(10,3,0)->(5,3,0)  [Ground]
  Ceiling     : (5,3,3.6)->(10,3,3.6)->(10,0,3.6)->(5,0,3.6)  [Interzone]
F1_S3:
  SouthWall   : (10,0,3.6)->(15,0,3.6)->(15,0,0)->(10,0,0)  [Outdoors]
  EastWall    : (15,0,3.6)->(15,3,3.6)->(15,3,0)->(15,0,0)  [Outdoors, Default_Ext_Wall]
  NorthWall   : (15,3,3.6)->(10,3,3.6)->(10,3,0)->(15,3,0)  [Zone, adj=F1_Corridor]
  WestWall    : (10,3,3.6)->(10,0,3.6)->(10,0,0)->(10,3,0)  [Zone, adj=F1_S2]
  Floor       : (10,0,0)->(15,0,0)->(15,3,0)->(10,3,0)  [Ground]
  Ceiling     : (10,3,3.6)->(15,3,3.6)->(15,0,3.6)->(10,0,3.6)  [Interzone]
F1_Corridor:
  SouthWall   : (0,3,3.6)->(15,3,3.6)->(15,3,0)->(0,3,0)  [Zone, adj=F1_S1,F1_S2,F1_S3 collectively; this surface must be split into three segments corresponding to each south zone's NorthWall and paired. Sub-surfaces:
      Corr_SouthWall_S1 : x 0-5, adj=F1_S1.NorthWall
      Corr_SouthWall_S2 : x 5-10, adj=F1_S2.NorthWall
      Corr_SouthWall_S3 : x 10-15, adj=F1_S3.NorthWall
      Each sub-surface uses vertices as per its x-range, with Construction Default_Int_Wall.]
  EastWall    : (15,3,3.6)->(15,5,3.6)->(15,5,0)->(15,3,0)  [Outdoors, Default_Ext_Wall]
  NorthWall   : (15,5,3.6)->(0,5,3.6)->(0,5,0)->(15,5,0)  [Zone, adj=F1_N1,F1_N2,F1_N3; split similarly into:
      Corr_NorthWall_N1 : x 0-5, adj=F1_N1.SouthWall
      Corr_NorthWall_N2 : x 5-10, adj=F1_N2.SouthWall
      Corr_NorthWall_N3 : x 10-15, adj=F1_N3.SouthWall]
  WestWall    : (0,5,3.6)->(0,3,3.6)->(0,3,0)->(0,5,0)  [Outdoors]
  Floor       : (0,3,0)->(15,3,0)->(15,5,0)->(0,5,0)  [Ground? technically this is over F1 space but it's a corridor floor at z=0.0, so Ground; Construction=Default_GroundFloor]
  Ceiling     : (0,5,3.6)->(15,5,3.6)->(15,3,3.6)->(0,3,3.6)  [Interzone]
F1_N1:
  SouthWall   : (0,5,3.6)->(5,5,3.6)->(5,5,0)->(0,5,0)  [Zone, adj=F1_Corridor (Corr_NorthWall_N1)]
  EastWall    : (5,5,3.6)->(5,8,3.6)->(5,8,0)->(5,5,0)  [Zone, adj=F1_N2, Default_Int_Wall]
  NorthWall   : (5,8,3.6)->(0,8,3.6)->(0,8,0)->(5,8,0)  [Outdoors]
  WestWall    : (0,8,3.6)->(0,5,3.6)->(0,5,0)->(0,8,0)  [Outdoors]
  Floor       : (0,5,0)->(5,5,0)->(5,8,0)->(0,8,0)  [Interzone, see pairing]
  Ceiling     : (0,8,3.6)->(5,8,3.6)->(5,5,3.6)->(0,5,3.6)  [Interzone]
F1_N2:
  SouthWall   : (5,5,3.6)->(10,5,3.6)->(10,5,0)->(5,5,0)  [Zone, adj=F1_Corridor (Corr_NorthWall_N2)]
  EastWall    : (10,5,3.6)->(10,8,3.6)->(10,8,0)->(10,5,0)  [Zone, adj=F1_N3]
  NorthWall   : (10,8,3.6)->(5,8,3.6)->(5,8,0)->(10,8,0)  [Outdoors]
  WestWall    : (5,8,3.6)->(5,5,3.6)->(5,5,0)->(5,8,0)  [Zone, adj=F1_N1]
  Floor       : (5,5,0)->(10,5,0)->(10,8,0)->(5,8,0)  [Interzone]
  Ceiling     : (5,8,3.6)->(10,8,3.6)->(10,5,3.6)->(5,5,3.6)  [Interzone]
F1_N3:
  SouthWall   : (10,5,3.6)->(15,5,3.6)->(15,5,0)->(10,5,0)  [Zone, adj=F1_Corridor (Corr_NorthWall_N3)]
  EastWall    : (15,5,3.6)->(15,8,3.6)->(15,8,0)->(15,5,0)  [Outdoors]
  NorthWall   : (15,8,3.6)->(10,8,3.6)->(10,8,0)->(15,8,0)  [Outdoors]
  WestWall    : (10,8,3.6)->(10,5,3.6)->(10,5,0)->(10,8,0)  [Zone, adj=F1_N2]
  Floor       : (10,5,0)->(15,5,0)->(15,8,0)->(10,8,0)  [Interzone]
  Ceiling     : (10,8,3.6)->(15,8,3.6)->(15,5,3.6)->(10,5,3.6)  [Interzone]

Floor 2 zones:
F2_S1:
  SouthWall   : (0,0,7.2)->(5,0,7.2)->(5,0,3.6)->(0,0,3.6)  [Outdoors]
  EastWall    : (5,0,7.2)->(5,3,7.2)->(5,3,3.6)->(5,0,3.6)  [Zone, adj=F2_S2]
  NorthWall   : (5,3,7.2)->(0,3,7.2)->(0,3,3.6)->(5,3,3.6)  [Zone, adj=F2_Corridor]
  WestWall    : (0,3,7.2)->(0,0,7.2)->(0,0,3.6)->(0,3,3.6)  [Outdoors]
  Floor       : (0,0,3.6)->(5,0,3.6)->(5,3,3.6)->(0,3,3.6)  [Interzone, pairs with F1_S1 ceiling]
  Ceiling     : (0,3,7.2)->(5,3,7.2)->(5,0,7.2)->(0,0,7.2)  [Interzone, see pairing for F2-F3 slab]
F2_S2:
  SouthWall   : (5,0,7.2)->(10,0,7.2)->(10,0,3.6)->(5,0,3.6)  [Outdoors]
  EastWall    : (10,0,7.2)->(10,3,7.2)->(10,3,3.6)->(10,0,3.6)  [Zone, adj=F2_S3]
  NorthWall   : (10,3,7.2)->(5,3,7.2)->(5,3,3.6)->(10,3,3.6)  [Zone, adj=F2_Corridor]
  WestWall    : (5,3,7.2)->(5,0,7.2)->(5,0,3.6)->(5,3,3.6)  [Zone, adj=F2_S1]
  Floor       : (5,0,3.6)->(10,0,3.6)->(10,3,3.6)->(5,3,3.6)  [Interzone, pairs with F1_S2 ceiling]
  Ceiling     : (5,3,7.2)->(10,3,7.2)->(10,0,7.2)->(5,0,7.2)  [Interzone]
F2_S3:
  SouthWall   : (10,0,7.2)->(15,0,7.2)->(15,0,3.6)->(10,0,3.6)  [Outdoors]
  EastWall    : (15,0,7.2)->(15,3,7.2)->(15,3,3.6)->(15,0,3.6)  [Outdoors]
  NorthWall   : (15,3,7.2)->(10,3,7.2)->(10,3,3.6)->(15,3,3.6)  [Zone, adj=F2_Corridor]
  WestWall    : (10,3,7.2)->(10,0,7.2)->(10,0,3.6)->(10,3,3.6)  [Zone, adj=F2_S2]
  Floor       : (10,0,3.6)->(15,0,3.6)->(15,3,3.6)->(10,3,3.6)  [Interzone, pairs with F1_S3 ceiling]
  Ceiling     : (10,3,7.2)->(15,3,7.2)->(15,0,7.2)->(10,0,7.2)  [Interzone]
F2_Corridor:
  SouthWall   : (0,3,7.2)->(15,3,7.2)->(15,3,3.6)->(0,3,3.6)  [Zone, adj=F2_S1,F2_S2,F2_S3 (split as before)]
  EastWall    : (15,3,7.2)->(15,5,7.2)->(15,5,3.6)->(15,3,3.6)  [Outdoors]
  NorthWall   : (15,5,7.2)->(0,5,7.2)->(0,5,3.6)->(15,5,3.6)  [Zone, adj=F2_N1,N2,N3,N4; split into:
      Corr_NorthWall_N1 : x 0-3.75, adj=F2_N1.SouthWall
      Corr_NorthWall_N2 : x 3.75-7.5, adj=F2_N2.SouthWall
      Corr_NorthWall_N3 : x 7.5-11.25, adj=F2_N3.SouthWall
      Corr_NorthWall_N4 : x 11.25-15, adj=F2_N4.SouthWall]
  WestWall    : (0,5,7.2)->(0,3,7.2)->(0,3,3.6)->(0,5,3.6)  [Outdoors]
  Floor       : (0,3,3.6)->(15,3,3.6)->(15,5,3.6)->(0,5,3.6)  [Interzone, pairs with F1_Corridor ceiling]
  Ceiling     : (0,5,7.2)->(15,5,7.2)->(15,3,7.2)->(0,3,7.2)  [Interzone, pairs with F3_Corridor floor]
F2_N1:
  SouthWall   : (0,5,7.2)->(3.75,5,7.2)->(3.75,5,3.6)->(0,5,3.6)  [Zone, adj=F2_Corridor (Corr_NorthWall_N1)]
  EastWall    : (3.75,5,7.2)->(3.75,8,7.2)->(3.75,8,3.6)->(3.75,5,3.6)  [Zone, adj=F2_N2]
  NorthWall   : (3.75,8,7.2)->(0,8,7.2)->(0,8,3.6)->(3.75,8,3.6)  [Outdoors]
  WestWall    : (0,8,7.2)->(0,5,7.2)->(0,5,3.6)->(0,8,3.6)  [Outdoors]
  Floor       : (0,5,3.6)->(3.75,5,3.6)->(3.75,8,3.6)->(0,8,3.6)  [Interzone, see split pairing F1<->F2]
  Ceiling     : (0,8,7.2)->(3.75,8,7.2)->(3.75,5,7.2)->(0,5,7.2)  [Interzone, pairs with F3_N1 floor split]
F2_N2:
  SouthWall   : (3.75,5,7.2)->(7.5,5,7.2)->(7.5,5,3.6)->(3.75,5,3.6)  [Zone, adj=F2_Corridor (Corr_NorthWall_N2)]
  EastWall    : (7.5,5,7.2)->(7.5,8,7.2)->(7.5,8,3.6)->(7.5,5,3.6)  [Zone, adj=F2_N3]
  NorthWall   : (7.5,8,7.2)->(3.75,8,7.2)->(3.75,8,3.6)->(7.5,8,3.6)  [Outdoors]
  WestWall    : (3.75,8,7.2)->(3.75,5,7.2)->(3.75,5,3.6)->(3.75,8,3.6)  [Zone, adj=F2_N1]
  Floor       : (3.75,5,3.6)->(7.5,5,3.6)->(7.5,8,3.6)->(3.75,8,3.6)  [Interzone]
  Ceiling     : (3.75,8,7.2)->(7.5,8,7.2)->(7.5,5,7.2)->(3.75,5,7.2)  [Interzone]
F2_N3:
  SouthWall   : (7.5,5,7.2)->(11.25,5,7.2)->(11.25,5,3.6)->(7.5,5,3.6)  [Zone, adj=F2_Corridor (Corr_NorthWall_N3)]
  EastWall    : (11.25,5,7.2)->(11.25,8,7.2)->(11.25,8,3.6)->(11.25,5,3.6)  [Zone, adj=F2_N4]
  NorthWall   : (11.25,8,7.2)->(7.5,8,7.2)->(7.5,8,3.6)->(11.25,8,3.6)  [Outdoors]
  WestWall    : (7.5,8,7.2)->(7.5,5,7.2)->(7.5,5,3.6)->(7.5,8,3.6)  [Zone, adj=F2_N2]
  Floor       : (7.5,5,3.6)->(11.25,5,3.6)->(11.25,8,3.6)->(7.5,8,3.6)  [Interzone]
  Ceiling     : (7.5,8,7.2)->(11.25,8,7.2)->(11.25,5,7.2)->(7.5,5,7.2)  [Interzone]
F2_N4:
  SouthWall   : (11.25,5,7.2)->(15,5,7.2)->(15,5,3.6)->(11.25,5,3.6)  [Zone, adj=F2_Corridor (Corr_NorthWall_N4)]
  EastWall    : (15,5,7.2)->(15,8,7.2)->(15,8,3.6)->(15,5,3.6)  [Outdoors]
  NorthWall   : (15,8,7.2)->(11.25,8,7.2)->(11.25,8,3.6)->(15,8,3.6)  [Outdoors]
  WestWall    : (11.25,8,7.2)->(11.25,5,7.2)->(11.25,5,3.6)->(11.25,8,3.6)  [Zone, adj=F2_N3]
  Floor       : (11.25,5,3.6)->(15,5,3.6)->(15,8,3.6)->(11.25,8,3.6)  [Interzone]
  Ceiling     : (11.25,8,7.2)->(15,8,7.2)->(15,5,7.2)->(11.25,5,7.2)  [Interzone]

Floor 3 zones:
F3_S1:
  SouthWall   : (0,0,12.0)->(7.5,0,12.0)->(7.5,0,7.2)->(0,0,7.2)  [Outdoors]
  EastWall    : (7.5,0,12.0)->(7.5,3,12.0)->(7.5,3,7.2)->(7.5,0,7.2)  [Zone, adj=F3_S2]
  NorthWall   : (7.5,3,12.0)->(0,3,12.0)->(0,3,7.2)->(7.5,3,7.2)  [Zone, adj=F3_Corridor]
  WestWall    : (0,3,12.0)->(0,0,12.0)->(0,0,7.2)->(0,3,7.2)  [Outdoors]
  Floor       : (0,0,7.2)->(7.5,0,7.2)->(7.5,3,7.2)->(0,3,7.2)  [Interzone, see F2-F3 slab pairing]
  Ceiling     : (0,3,12.0)->(7.5,3,12.0)->(7.5,0,12.0)->(0,0,12.0)  [Outdoors/Roof, Construction=Default_Roof]
F3_S2:
  SouthWall   : (7.5,0,12.0)->(15,0,12.0)->(15,0,7.2)->(7.5,0,7.2)  [Outdoors]
  EastWall    : (15,0,12.0)->(15,3,12.0)->(15,3,7.2)->(15,0,7.2)  [Outdoors]
  NorthWall   : (15,3,12.0)->(7.5,3,12.0)->(7.5,3,7.2)->(15,3,7.2)  [Zone, adj=F3_Corridor]
  WestWall    : (7.5,3,12.0)->(7.5,0,12.0)->(7.5,0,7.2)->(7.5,3,7.2)  [Zone, adj=F3_S1]
  Floor       : (7.5,0,7.2)->(15,0,7.2)->(15,3,7.2)->(7.5,3,7.2)  [Interzone]
  Ceiling     : (7.5,3,12.0)->(15,3,12.0)->(15,0,12.0)->(7.5,0,12.0)  [Outdoors/Roof]
F3_Corridor:
  SouthWall   : (0,3,12.0)->(15,3,12.0)->(15,3,7.2)->(0,3,7.2)  [Zone, adj=F3_S1,S2; split into:
      Corr_SouthWall_S1 : x 0-7.5, adj=F3_S1.NorthWall
      Corr_SouthWall_S2 : x 7.5-15, adj=F3_S2.NorthWall]
  EastWall    : (15,3,12.0)->(15,5,12.0)->(15,5,7.2)->(15,3,7.2)  [Outdoors]
  NorthWall   : (15,5,12.0)->(0,5,12.0)->(0,5,7.2)->(15,5,7.2)  [Zone, adj=F3_N1]
  WestWall    : (0,5,12.0)->(0,3,12.0)->(0,3,7.2)->(0,5,7.2)  [Outdoors]
  Floor       : (0,3,7.2)->(15,3,7.2)->(15,5,7.2)->(0,5,7.2)  [Interzone, pairs with F2_Corridor ceiling]
  Ceiling     : (0,5,12.0)->(15,5,12.0)->(15,3,12.0)->(0,3,12.0)  [Outdoors/Roof]
F3_N1:
  SouthWall   : (0,5,12.0)->(15,5,12.0)->(15,5,7.2)->(0,5,7.2)  [Zone, adj=F3_Corridor]
  EastWall    : (15,5,12.0)->(15,8,12.0)->(15,8,7.2)->(15,5,7.2)  [Outdoors]
  NorthWall   : (15,8,12.0)->(0,8,12.0)->(0,8,7.2)->(15,8,7.2)  [Outdoors]
  WestWall    : (0,8,12.0)->(0,5,12.0)->(0,5,7.2)->(0,8,7.2)  [Outdoors]
  Floor       : (0,5,7.2)->(15,5,7.2)->(15,8,7.2)->(0,8,7.2)  [Interzone, see split F2<->F3]
  Ceiling     : (0,8,12.0)->(15,8,12.0)->(15,5,12.0)->(0,5,12.0)  [Outdoors/Roof]

INTERZONE FLOOR/CEILING PAIRINGS (explicit, no templates):
F1 ↔ F2 slab:
  F1_S1.Ceiling  (0,0,3.6 -> 5,3,3.6)  pairs with  F2_S1.Floor  (0,0,3.6 -> 5,3,3.6)
  F1_S2.Ceiling  (5,0,3.6 -> 10,3,3.6)  pairs with  F2_S2.Floor  (5,0,3.6 -> 10,3,3.6)
  F1_S3.Ceiling  (10,0,3.6 -> 15,3,3.6)  pairs with  F2_S3.Floor  (10,0,3.6 -> 15,3,3.6)
  F1_Corridor.Ceiling  (0,3,3.6 -> 15,5,3.6)  pairs with  F2_Corridor.Floor  (0,3,3.6 -> 15,5,3.6)
  F1_N1.Ceiling is split into three sub-surfaces to match F2 north zones:
      F1_N1_Ceiling_Split1  (x[0,3.75], y[5,8])  pairs with  F2_N1.Floor  (0,5,3.6 -> 3.75,8,3.6)
      F1_N1_Ceiling_Split2  (x[3.75,5.0], y[5,8])  pairs with  part of F2_N2.Floor  (the portion x[3.75,5.0], y[5,8]) which lies within F1_N1. So F2_N2.Floor is split: left part x[3.75,5.0] pairs with this split, right part x[5.0,7.5] pairs with a split of F1_N2.Ceiling. For clarity:
         * F1_N2_Ceiling_Split1  (x[5.0,7.5], y[5,8])  pairs with  F2_N2.Floor_right (x[5.0,7.5], y[5,8])
      F1_N2_Ceiling_Split2  (x[7.5,10.0], y[5,8])  pairs with  F2_N3.Floor (x[7.5,11.25])? Wait, F2_N3 floor is x[7.5,11.25] but F1_N2 is only up to 10.0. So F2_N3.Floor spans x[7.5,11.25]. The part x[7.5,10] lies over F1_N2; the part x[10,11.25] lies over F1_N3. Therefore:
         * F1_N2_Ceiling_Split2  (x[7.5,10.0])  pairs with  left part of F2_N3.Floor (x[7.5,10.0])
         * F1_N3_Ceiling_Split1  (x[10.0,11.25])  pairs with  right part of F2_N3.Floor (x[10.0,11.25])
      F1_N3_Ceiling_Split2  (x[11.25,15.0], y[5,8])  pairs with  F2_N4.Floor (x[11.25,15.0])
  All these sub-surfaces must be created explicitly and paired one-to-one.
F2 ↔ F3 slab:
  F2_Corridor.Ceiling  (0,3,7.2 -> 15,5,7.2)  pairs with  F3_Corridor.Floor  (0,3,7.2 -> 15,5,7.2)
  F2 south zones ceilings must be split to match the two F3 south zones (F3_S1 x 0-7.5, F3_S2 x 7.5-15):
      F2_S1.Ceiling  (x[0,5])  pairs with  a segment of F3_S1.Floor (x[0,5])
      F2_S2.Ceiling  (x[5,10]) is split: left part x[5,7.5] pairs with another segment of F3_S1.Floor (x[5,7.5]), right part x[7.5,10] pairs with segment of F3_S2.Floor (x[7.5,10])
      F2_S3.Ceiling  (x[10,15]) pairs with segment of F3_S2.Floor (x[10,15])
  F2 north zones ceilings need to be combined into the single F3_N1 floor (which covers entire x[0,15]):
      F2_N1.Ceiling  (x[0,3.75])  pairs with segment of F3_N1.Floor (x[0,3.75])
      F2_N2.Ceiling  (x[3.75,7.5]) pairs with segment of F3_N1.Floor (x[3.75,7.5])
      F2_N3.Ceiling  (x[7.5,11.25]) pairs with segment of F3_N1.Floor (x[7.5,11.25])
      F2_N4.Ceiling  (x[11.25,15]) pairs with segment of F3_N1.Floor (x[11.25,15])
  All pairings are with Construction=Default_Floor/Ceiling and boundary condition Interzone.
Interior wall pairings (same storey):
  - F1_S1 EastWall ↔ F1_S2 WestWall
  - F1_S2 EastWall ↔ F1_S3 WestWall
  - F1_N1 EastWall ↔ F1_N2 WestWall
  - F1_N2 EastWall ↔ F1_N3 WestWall
  - corridor SouthWall segments paired with each south zone NorthWall as described
  - same pattern for F2 and F3.
  All paired interior walls share the same vertices and have Construction=Default_Int_Wall.
fenestration_specs:
Windows are placed on external walls only. All windows use Construction=Default_Window. Each window is a rectangular opening with vertices listed CCW from outside (same as parent wall vertex order). Coordinates are world coordinates derived from facade formulas (phase1_summary.md §3).

South facade (Y=0, outward normal +Y? Actually outside face of South wall looks south, so outward normal is +Y but EnergyPlus expects vertices CCW from outside. For a South wall the outside face is at y=0, the wall extends from z_floor to z_top. The vertex order (from §4) for South wall is (x_min, y_min, z_top) -> (x_max, y_min, z_top) -> (x_max, y_min, z_floor) -> (x_min, y_min, z_floor). That is CCW from outside viewing from south looking north. So we follow that.

Windows from South_view.json (local y = world z):
  F1 windows (z_floor 0, z_top 3.6):
    Window_F1_South_1: parent surface F1_S1.SouthWall (or F1_S1 SouthWall, since x[1.40,3.80] falls within F1_S1 zone x[0,5]).
        world X: [1.40, 3.80], Y: 0, Z: [1.00, 2.80] (sill=1.00, height=1.80).
        Vertices: (1.40,0,2.80) -> (3.80,0,2.80) -> (3.80,0,1.00) -> (1.40,0,1.00)
    Window_F1_South_2: parent F1_S2.SouthWall (x[6.30,8.70] within x[5,10])
        Vertices: (6.30,0,2.80) -> (8.70,0,2.80) -> (8.70,0,1.00) -> (6.30,0,1.00)
    Window_F1_South_3: parent F1_S3.SouthWall (x[11.20,13.60] within x[10,15])
        Vertices: (11.20,0,2.80) -> (13.60,0,2.80) -> (13.60,0,1.00) -> (11.20,0,1.00)
  F2 windows (z_floor 3.6, z_top 7.2):
    Window_F2_South_1: parent F2_S1.SouthWall (x[1.40,3.80])
        Vertices: (1.40,0,6.20) -> (3.80,0,6.20) -> (3.80,0,4.40) -> (1.40,0,4.40)
    Window_F2_South_2: parent F2_S2.SouthWall (x[6.30,8.70])
        Vertices: (6.30,0,6.20) -> (8.70,0,6.20) -> (8.70,0,4.40) -> (6.30,0,4.40)
    Window_F2_South_3: parent F2_S3.SouthWall (x[11.20,13.60])
        Vertices: (11.20,0,6.20) -> (13.60,0,6.20) -> (13.60,0,4.40) -> (11.20,0,4.40)
  F3: no windows on South.

North facade (Y=8, outward normal -Y? The outside face is at y=8, outward normal is +Y? Wait, North wall at y=8, the outside is northward, so outward normal is +Y (since y increases north). Vertices CCW from outside: for North wall at y=y_max (from §4): (x_max, y_max, z_top) -> (x_min, y_max, z_top) -> (x_min, y_max, z_floor) -> (x_max, y_max, z_floor). This is CCW when viewed from north looking south. Using North_view.json with formula: X_world = 15 - x_local, Y_world = 8, Z_world = y_local. Windows local ranges -> world.
  F1 windows (z_floor 0, z_top 3.6):
    Window_F1_North_1: local x[1.40,3.80] -> world X: [15-3.80=11.20, 15-1.40=13.60] so X[11.20,13.60], Y=8, Z[1.00,2.80]. This falls within F1_N3 zone (x[10,15]) which has NorthWall at y=8. Parent: F1_N3.NorthWall.
        Vertices (CCW from outside north): (13.60,8,2.80) -> (11.20,8,2.80) -> (11.20,8,1.00) -> (13.60,8,1.00)
    Window_F1_North_2: local x[6.30,8.70] -> world X [15-8.70=6.30, 15-6.30=8.70] -> [6.30,8.70] within F1_N2 (x[5,10]). Parent: F1_N2.NorthWall.
        Vertices: (8.70,8,2.80) -> (6.30,8,2.80) -> (6.30,8,1.00) -> (8.70,8,1.00)
    Window_F1_North_3: local x[11.20,13.60] -> world X [15-13.60=1.40, 15-11.20=3.80] -> [1.40,3.80] within F1_N1 (x[0,5]). Parent: F1_N1.NorthWall.
        Vertices: (3.80,8,2.80) -> (1.40,8,2.80) -> (1.40,8,1.00) -> (3.80,8,1.00)
  F2 windows (z_floor 3.6, z_top 7.2):
    local ranges from North_view.json: S7 x[1.40,3.15], S8 x[4.80,6.55], S9 x[8.45,10.20], S10 x[11.85,13.60], all y[4.40,6.20] (Z: 4.40–6.20).
    Transform to world X:
      Window_F2_North_1: local x[1.40,3.15] -> X [15-3.15=11.85, 15-1.40=13.60] -> [11.85,13.60] within F2_N4 (x[11.25,15]). Parent: F2_N4.NorthWall.
        Vertices: (13.60,8,6.20) -> (11.85,8,6.20) -> (11.85,8,4.40) -> (13.60,8,4.40)
      Window_F2_North_2: local x[4.80,6.55] -> X [15-6.55=8.45, 15-4.80=10.20] -> [8.45,10.20] within F2_N3 (x[7.5,11.25]). Parent: F2_N3.NorthWall.
        Vertices: (10.20,8,6.20) -> (8.45,8,6.20) -> (8.45,8,4.40) -> (10.20,8,4.40)
      Window_F2_North_3: local x[8.45,10.20] -> X [15-10.20=4.80, 15-8.45=6.55] -> [4.80,6.55] within F2_N2 (x[3.75,7.5]). Parent: F2_N2.NorthWall.
        Vertices: (6.55,8,6.20) -> (4.80,8,6.20) -> (4.80,8,4.40) -> (6.55,8,4.40)
      Window_F2_North_4: local x[11.85,13.60] -> X [15-13.60=1.40, 15-11.85=3.15] -> [1.40,3.15] within F2_N1 (x[0,3.75]). Parent: F2_N1.NorthWall.
        Vertices: (3.15,8,6.20) -> (1.40,8,6.20) -> (1.40,8,4.40) -> (3.15,8,4.40)
  F3 window (z_floor 7.2, z_top 12.0):
    local x[1.40,13.60], y[8.20,10.80] (Z 8.20–10.80). World X: [15-13.60=1.40, 15-1.40=13.60] -> [1.40,13.60], Y=8, Z[8.20,10.80]. Parent: F3_N1.NorthWall (covers entire x 0–15).
    Window_F3_North_Long: Vertices (13.60,8,10.80) -> (1.40,8,10.80) -> (1.40,8,8.20) -> (13.60,8,8.20)

East facade (X=15, outward normal +X? East wall outside face at x=15, outward normal is +X (east). CCW vertex order from §4 for East wall: (x_max, y_min, z_top) -> (x_max, y_max, z_top) -> (x_max, y_max, z_floor) -> (x_max, y_min, z_floor). Using formula: X_world = 15, Y_world = x_local, Z = y_local. East_view.json: F3 window only: local x[3.50,4.50], y[8.20,10.60] -> World Y: [3.50,4.50], X=15, Z[8.20,10.60]. This falls within F3_Corridor EastWall? F3_Corridor east wall is at x=15, y ranges [3,5] so y-local [3,5] covered. Yes, parent: F3_Corridor.EastWall.
    Window_F3_East: Vertices (15,3.50,10.60) -> (15,4.50,10.60) -> (15,4.50,8.20) -> (15,3.50,8.20)

West facade (X=0, outward normal -X? West wall outside at x=0, outward normal is -X (west). CCW for West wall: (x_min, y_max, z_top) -> (x_min, y_min, z_top) -> (x_min, y_min, z_floor) -> (x_min, y_max, z_floor). Formula: X_world=0, Y_world=8 - x_local, Z=y_local. West_view.json: F3 window local x[3.50,4.50], y[8.20,10.60] -> World Y: [8-4.50=3.50, 8-3.50=4.50] -> [3.50,4.50], X=0, Z[8.20,10.60]. Parent: F3_Corridor.WestWall.
    Window_F3_West: Vertices (0,4.50,10.60) -> (0,3.50,10.60) -> (0,3.50,8.20) -> (0,4.50,8.20)

All windows are standalone, no combined constructions.
hvac_specs: HVAC system: ZoneHVAC:IdealLoadsAirSystem for each zone. Thermostat setpoints: heating 20°C, cooling 24°C, following a schedule (Office_Thermostat_Heating and Office_Thermostat_Cooling). The availability schedule is always-on (Office_HVAC). Outside air: 0.00944 m3/s per person (based on ASHRAE 62.1 office). The ideal loads system uses sensible and latent cooling and heating. No DOAS or other central systems.
people_specs: People density: 0.1 persons/m² (i.e., 10 m²/person). Activity level: 120 W/person (office sitting). Occupancy schedule: Office_Workday. Assign people to all office zones (all zones except corridors). For corridors, no people.
lights_specs: Lighting power density: 10 W/m² for offices, 5 W/m² for corridors (ASHRAE 90.1). Schedule: Office_Lighting (same as Office_Workday). Assign to all zones. Lighting to return air fraction: 0.0 (all heat goes to zone).
